case_title: DAVID R. HIRTZ VS. BLACK BEAR SECURITY SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $871.40 FILED BY HIRTZ, DAVID R. AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK BEAR SECURITY SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
